title: Managing inventory
summary: 9609 AS — stock control, holding costs, and buffer inventory.
learningObjectives: Describe reorder level and buffer stock.

simpleExplanation.title: Balancing stock levels
simpleExplanation.summary: Firms hold inventory to meet demand and avoid production stops, but storage ties up cash and risks waste.

sections.content: **Managing inventory** (4.2.1) leads to **4.2.2 JIT**. Quantify **holding cost vs stock-out risk** in evaluation.
